title: The death of the Imam 'Ali al-Rids; al-Hasan b. Sahl's nervous breakdown
description: The death of the Imam 'Ali al-Rids; al-Hasan b. Sahl's nervous breakdown. Recorded under the year 202 AH (818 CE) in al-Tabari's History, volume 32.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 32
